title: MTBF/MTTR Financial Impact Calculator
description: Calculates the financial impact of equipment reliability (MTBF) and maintainability (MTTR) based on industrial engineering standards (ISO 14224, ISO 55000, Six Sigma, Lean).

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: Total planned operating hours of the equipment per year. Used to calculate failure frequency and downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total planned operating hours of the equipment per year. Used to calculate failure frequency and downtime.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipmanın yıllık planlanan toplam çalışma saati. Arıza sıklığı ve duruş süresini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte geplante Betriebsstunden der Anlage pro Jahr. Wird zur Berechnung der Ausfallhäufigkeit und Stillstandszeit verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'heures de fonctionnement prévues de l'équipement par an. Utilisé pour calculer la fréquence des défaillances et les temps d'arrêt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas totales de operación planificada del equipo por año. Se usa para calcular la frecuencia de fallas y el tiempo de inactividad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي ساعات التشغيل المخطط لها للمعدات سنويًا. يُستخدم لحساب تكرار الأعطال ووقت التوقف.

inputs.label: Number of Units
inputs.businessContext: Total number of identical or similar assets in the fleet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of identical or similar assets in the fleet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Filotaki özdeş veya benzer varlıkların toplam sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl identischer oder ähnlicher Anlagen im Bestand.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'actifs identiques ou similaires dans la flotte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de activos idénticos o similares en la flota.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الأصول المتطابقة أو المماثلة في الأسطول.

inputs.label: Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF)
inputs.businessContext: Average time between failures for a repairable system. Higher is better. ISO 14224.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time between failures for a repairable system. Higher is better. ISO 14224.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arızalar arası ortalama süre (MTBF). Daha yüksek daha iyidir. ISO 14224.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Zeit zwischen Ausfällen eines reparierbaren Systems. Höher ist besser. ISO 14224.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps moyen entre pannes pour un système réparable. Plus élevé est meilleur. ISO 14224.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo promedio entre fallas para un sistema reparable. Más alto es mejor. ISO 14224.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الوقت بين الأعطال لنظام قابل للإصلاح. كلما زاد كان أفضل. ISO 14224.

inputs.label: Mean Time To Repair (MTTR)
inputs.businessContext: Average time to restore a failed system to operational state. Lower is better. Includes diagnosis, repair, testing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time to restore a failed system to operational state. Lower is better. Includes diagnosis, repair, testing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortalama onarım süresi (MTTR). Daha düşük daha iyidir. Teşhis, onarım, test dahil.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps moyen pour restaurer un système défaillant à un état opérationnel. Plus bas est meilleur. Inclut diagnostic, réparation, test.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo promedio para restaurar un sistema fallido a estado operativo. Más bajo es mejor. Incluye diagnóstico, reparación, pruebas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط وقت استعادة النظام المعطل إلى الحالة التشغيلية. كلما قل كان أفضل. يشمل التشخيص والإصلاح والاختبار.

inputs.label: Cost per Downtime Hour
inputs.businessContext: Lost profit or cost incurred per hour of equipment downtime (lost production, labor, penalties).

businessContext_i18n.en: Lost profit or cost incurred per hour of equipment downtime (lost production, labor, penalties).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipman duruşu saat başına kaybedilen kar veya oluşan maliyet (kayıp üretim, işçilik, cezalar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Verlust oder Kosten pro Stunde Maschinenstillstand (Produktionsausfall, Lohnkosten, Strafen)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Perte de profit ou coût encouru par heure d'arrêt d'équipement (production perdue, main-d'œuvre, pénalités).
businessContext_i18n.es: Pérdida de beneficio o coste incurrido por hora de inactividad del equipo (producción perdida, mano de obra, penalizaciones).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الربح المفقود أو التكلفة المتكبدة لكل ساعة توقف للمعدات (فقدان الإنتاج، العمالة، الغرامات).

inputs.label: Cost per Failure Event (excluding downtime)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed costs per failure: spare parts, logistics, contractor fees, administrative overhead.

label_i18n.fr: Coût par événement de panne (hors arrêt)
label_i18n.es: Coste por evento de fallo (excluyendo tiempo de inactividad)
label_i18n.ar: التكلفة لكل حدث عطل (باستثناء وقت التوقف)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed costs per failure: spare parts, logistics, contractor fees, administrative overhead.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arıza başına sabit maliyetler: yedek parça, lojistik, yüklenici ücretleri, idari giderler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fixkosten pro Ausfall: Ersatzteile, Logistik, Fremdfirmen, Verwaltungsaufwand
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts fixes par panne : pièces de rechange, logistique, frais de sous-traitance, frais administratifs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes fijos por fallo: piezas de repuesto, logística, honorarios de contratistas, gastos administrativos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكاليف الثابتة لكل عطل: قطع الغيار، الخدمات اللوجستية، رسوم المقاولين، النفقات الإدارية.

inputs.label: Maintenance Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly cost of maintenance personnel (including overhead).

label_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra de mantenimiento

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly cost of maintenance personnel (including overhead).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bakım personelinin saatlik maliyeti (genel giderler dahil).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût horaire du personnel de maintenance (y compris frais généraux).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste por hora del personal de mantenimiento (incluyendo gastos generales).
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة بالساعة لأفراد الصيانة (بما في ذلك النفقات العامة).

inputs.label: Reliability Improvement Investment (annual)
inputs.businessContext: Annual budget allocated to reliability improvement projects (training, redesign, predictive maintenance).

label_i18n.fr: Investissement annuel en amélioration de la fiabilité
label_i18n.es: Inversión anual en mejora de la fiabilidad

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual budget allocated to reliability improvement projects (training, redesign, predictive maintenance).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güvenilirlik iyileştirme projelerine ayrılan yıllık bütçe (eğitim, yeniden tasarım, kestirimci bakım).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliches Budget für Zuverlässigkeitsprojekte (Schulung, Neukonstruktion, vorausschauende Instandhaltung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Budget annuel alloué aux projets d'amélioration de la fiabilité (formation, reconception, maintenance prédictive).
businessContext_i18n.es: Presupuesto anual asignado a proyectos de mejora de la fiabilidad (formación, rediseño, mantenimiento predictivo).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الميزانية السنوية المخصصة لمشاريع تحسين الموثوقية (التدريب، إعادة التصميم، الصيانة التنبؤية).

rules.message: MTBF and MTTR must be positive numbers.
Current availability is below target. Consider improving MTBF or reducing MTTR.

thresholds.alert: Availability is critically low. Immediate action recommended.
Annual downtime cost exceeds $100k. Consider reliability improvement.
MTBF is below industry benchmark. Investigate root causes.

hiddenLossDrivers: Composite model — validate each cost leg against actuals
Physical exposure factors are normalized estimates
suggestedActions: Reconcile labor and maintenance legs separately
Benchmark noise/vibration factors with site measurement
